{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320151346571C07318BFB40C02A02"}"},"total":2600},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6993328875334058785","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"之前为了看特种兵的小说，特意补了一下特1、特2，小说里把原本的《我是特种兵》剧情、人物都分析的挺好的，男主走自己路，不抢别人的功，补了原本遗憾和不足，军人的职责，兄弟的情谊，看的很让人感动！也很热血！男主为女主真的是大手笔呀，让人直呼：太有钱了！男主参加训练，打对抗赛，出任务，描写都很不错，很有画面感，文笔很好！请继续加油！","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":5,"text":"特种兵","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399082640C02A02%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226993328875334058785%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226918014883145452551%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":37,"s":32,"text":"我是特种兵","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%88%91%E6%98%AF%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399082640C02A02%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226993328875334058785%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226918014883145452551%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%88%91%E6%98%AF%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1628261267,"group_id":"6918014883145452551","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw8IH/VB+DlfyhsOSnNxygXaFkNKukjPNnLekqSNCmrY","gender":1,"is_cancel "},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"658"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320151346571C07318BFB40C02A02"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读37小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":54,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":69895,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":133095,"reply_count":24,"show_pv":87105},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7123848416379405094","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢军旅题材的书，这本书前面部分写得很好，有些地方也比较搞笑，看着有些情节好像我在另外本特种兵里面看过，但是也还好，能接受，喜欢男主性格特点，不过好像文中有些细节没有写清楚，但后面又出现，比如女主不是就生了个女儿吗？怎么后面又有儿子、女儿的，看得有点懵，后面的的章节有点让人看着不爽，都是在处分降级中直至文章结束都没写男主回复职位什么，男主的第一个班长后来也没音讯，都没提到过了，就这样结束了！","text_exts":[{"e":48,"s":45,"text":"特种兵","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399082640C02A02%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227123848416379405094%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226918014883145452551%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658650310,"group_id":"6918014883145452551","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"“好的关系，都是互相迁就，双向奔赴，你愿意，我值得”","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nywu/kX0T2cQDCDXDH9KQWWQss65eaLNwyV8TcqhuleA","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d13659ddc13344deba4e9e054b125a90~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=17765
